components.content: Physical asset counts · register vs scanned reconciliation

actionArguments.expression: if (selectedRow.status === 3) { application.navigator.navigateToForm({ name: 'variance-reconciliation-worklist', module: 'Shesha.AssetManagement' }, { id: selectedRow.id }); } else { application.navigator.navigateToForm({ name: 'campaign-detail-form', module: 'Shesha.AssetManagement' }, { id: selectedRow.id }); }

content._code: var sub = (data.campaignNo || '') + (data.startedDate ? (' · ' + moment(data.startedDate).format('DD MMM YYYY')) : ''); return data.name + (sub ? ('  (' + sub + ')') : '');
var n = data.leadOfficerName || ''; var d = data.leadOfficerDeviceName; return n + (d ? (' · ' + d) : '');

percent._code: var expected = data.expectedCount; var scanned = data.scannedCount != null ? data.scannedCount : 0; return (!expected || expected <= 0) ? 0 : Math.round((scanned / expected) * 100);

components.properties: name id campaignNo startedDate leadOfficer { id _displayName } scannedCount expectedCount status
